title: tragacantha squarrosa
intro: Tragacantha squarrosa, also known as Squarroso Tragacanth or Tragacanth gum, is a type of plant-based mucilaginous substance derived from the sap of the Astragalus gummifer plant. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, which have been attributed to its ability to form a protective barrier on the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Tragacantha squarrosa include its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and promote the absorption of nutrients. Tragacantha squarrosa is often prepared in herbal form as a powder or tablet, and can also be found in various topical creams and ointments.
